---
title: "Visualization"
---

Welcome 

```{ojs}

data = FileAttachment("gh_eff.json").json()

// 2. Define and render the Vega-Lite specification
vegaEmbed = require("vega-embed@6")

vegaEmbed(display(), {
  "$schema": "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v6.json",
  "description": "A simple bar chart with embedded data.",
  "data": { "values": data},
  "mark": "bar",
  "encoding": {
    "y": {"field": "Year", "type": "quantitative"},
    "tooltip": true
  },
  "width": "container"
})
